findings.location: sections s3, s5, s7, s9, s11, s13, s15
findings.description: Seven sections (s3, s5, s7, s9, s11, s13, s15) all contain only 'なし' and do not correspond to any content in the source file. The source has 1 H1 + 8 H2 sections = 9 content units, but the knowledge file contains 16 sections. These empty sections inflate the index without adding value. Each source H2 section should map to a single knowledge section, not a (empty, content) pair.
findings.source_evidence: Source H2 sections: lean and rapid, long life, mission critical, independent, single point of truth and multi-purpose module, global, testablity, whole engineering — 8 sections total. None of these have sub-sections or introductory paragraphs that would justify splitting into two knowledge sections each.
